expected_behavior: A 30 m lookup-subgrid local-inertial steady-flow ladder should reproduce a 10 m ordinary local-inertial numerical-reference compound-channel response at internal gauges away from the outlet.
acceptance_threshold: inbank depth RMSE <0.05 m and storage error <5%; near-bankfull/overbank depth RMSE <0.10 m and storage error <10%; mass residual <0.1%
